text: Bitcoin is treading water near $60k with modest daily gains, while Ethereum's stronger 2% move suggests some rotation into altcoins despite extreme fear conditions. The Fear & Greed index at 15 and deteriorating over the past week indicates capitulation sentiment, though $84B in daily volume remains substantial enough to suggest institutional presence hasn't fully withdrawn. Bitcoin's 55.8% dominance uptick signals defensive positioning as traders reduce exposure to smaller-cap assets during this fear phase.
